resources.string: Math Rush-All calculations are performed strictly from LEFT to RIGHT.-How To Play-Analyze the Target-Target Number-Fill the Gaps-Beat the Clock-+10 Points

is a arithmetic game designed to sharpen your brain and test your speed. In a world where every second counts, you must build equations on the fly to reach a target goal. To keep the game fast and intuitive, Math Rush ignores standard mathematical order of operations.
is displayed at the top of the screen. This is your goal for the round.
Below the target, you will see an equation with empty boxes and operators (+, -, ×, ÷). Tap a box and type a positive number (1–99) to complete the math.
As soon as the last empty box is filled, the game checks your answer. If it matches the target, you earn
and a new challenge appears instantly. Solve as many as you can before the timer hits zero!
